mapper.select: SELECT ROUND((A.CURR_ATTENDANCE_COUNT * 100) / NULLIF(B.CURR_COUNT, 0), 2) AS CURR_ATND_RATE, ROUND((A.PRE_ATTENDANCE_COUNT * 100) / NULLIF(B.PRE_COUNT, 0), 2) AS PRE_ATND_RATE, ROUND((A.CURR_ATTENDANCE_COUNT * 100) / NULLIF(B.CURR_COUNT, 0), 2) - ROUND((A.PRE_ATTENDANCE_COUNT * 100) / NULLIF(B.PRE_COUNT, 0), 2) AS DIFF_ATND_RATE FROM ( -- [A] 출석자 수 구하기 (테이블 한 번만 스캔) SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN Q.REQ_DATE = D.CURR_SUN THEN 1 END) AS CURR_ATTENDANCE_COUNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN Q.REQ_DATE = D.PREV_SUN THEN 1 END) AS PRE_ATTENDANCE_COUNT FROM QUEST_LOGS Q CROSS JOIN ( -- 날짜를 여기서 한 번만 계산합니다! SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL - DAYOFWEEK(CURDATE()) + 1 DAY), '%Y%m%d') AS CURR_SUN, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL - DAYOFWEEK(CURDATE()) - 6 DAY), '%Y%m%d') AS PREV_SUN) D WHERE Q.QUEST_SN = 2 AND Q.STATUS = 'APPROVED' AND Q.REQ_DATE IN (D.CURR_SUN, D.PREV_SUN) -- 4등급 길드원의 출석만 필터링 (IN 절 내부 최적화) AND Q.MBER_SN IN (SELECT M.MBER_SN FROM GUILD_MBER_LIST M INNER JOIN GUILD_INFO G ON M.GUILD_SN = G.GUILD_SN WHERE M.EXIT_DATE IS NULL AND G.GRADE = 4 AND M.JOIN_DATE < D.CURR_SUN)) A, ( -- [B] 총인원 수 구하기 (테이블 한 번만 스캔) SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN M.JOIN_DATE < D.CURR_SUN THEN 1 END) AS CURR_COUNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN M.JOIN_DATE < D.PREV_SUN THEN 1 END) AS PRE_COUNT FROM GUILD_MBER_LIST M INNER JOIN GUILD_INFO G ON M.GUILD_SN = G.GUILD_SN CROSS JOIN ( -- 여기서도 날짜를 한 번만 계산해서 사용합니다. SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL - DAYOFWEEK(CURDATE()) + 1 DAY), '%Y%m%d') AS CURR_SUN, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL - DAYOFWEEK(CURDATE()) - 6 DAY), '%Y%m%d') AS PREV_SUN) D WHERE M.EXIT_DATE IS NULL AND G.GRADE = 4 AND M.JOIN_DATE < D.CURR_SUN -- 이번 주 일요일 이전 가입자까지만 스캔 ) B
